channel.title: Steel Inserts,Tungsten Carbide Turning Inserts,CNC Cutting Tool
channel.description: Elevate your machining precision with Estool's top-grade steel turning inserts. Explore our range for superior durability and performance, optimizing your machining processes effortlessly.

item.title: Hot sale cnc machines turning carbide manufacturer inserts WNMG TM
item.description:
Code: WNMG060404/WNMG060408/WNMG080412

 

Description

Dimension

WNMG060404-TM6.50 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.40 
WNMG060408-TM6.50 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.80 
WNMG060412-TM6.50 9.525 4.76 3.81 1.20 
WNMG080404-TM8.70 12.70 4.76 5.16 0.40 
WNMG080408-TM8.70 12.70 4.76 5.16 0.80 
WNMG080412-TM8.70 12.70 4.76 5.16 1.20 

Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

SNMG150612-TM15.875 15.875 6.35 6.35 1.20

item.author: Steel Inserts

item.title: SNMM-TR CNC Lathe Tungsten Carbide Inserts For Steel turning inserts
item.description:
Code: SNMM190616/SNMM190624/SNMM250924/SNMM250932

 

Description

Dimension


                            
ISOLI.CSdr
SNMM190616-RH19.05 19.05 6.35 7.94 1.60 
SNMM190624-RH19.05 19.05 6.35 7.94 2.40 
SNMM250924-HY25.40 25.40 9.525 9.12 2.40 
SNMM250932-HY25.40 25.40 9.525 9.12 3.20 

CVD Coated Cemented Carbide

GradeDescriptionEquivalentto ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance in com bination with MT-TiCN, fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.PO5~P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for sem i-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20~P35
YC3025MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance in com bination with TiCN+AI2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is optimal for fin ishing and semi-finishing of stainless steel.M05~M15
YC3035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with special micro structure in com bination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multilayer coating, which is optimal for fin ishing an d roughing of stainless steeI.M10~M25
YC3045MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent toughness in com bination with TiCN+AI2O3(thin)+TIN multi-layer coating, wh ich is optimal for sem i-finishing and roughing of stainless steel.M20~M35
YC2005MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination withAl2O3(extra thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05~K15
YC2015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent hardness and stripping resistance in combination withAl203(thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is su itable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10~K30
YC2025MT-VD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance and toughness in com bination withAl2O3(extra thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, which is suitable for the milling of cast iron(for example, nodular iron) at middle and high speed and interrupted turning.K20~K35

Dimension

TypeDiameter of IC(mm)Thickness(mm)Nose Radius(mm)
SNMM150612-TR15.8756.351.2
SNMM190612-TM19.056.351.2
SNM190616-TR .19.056.351.6
SNMM190624-TR .19.056.352.4
SNMM250724-TR257.942.4
SNMM250924-TR259.522.4


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Steel Inserts

item.title: CNMM190616/CNMM250924 Gravity Turning inserts high quality carbide cutting tool for machine tools
item.description:
Code: CNMM190616/CNMM190624/CNMM250924/CNMM250932

Description

Dimension

 


                                  
ISO L I.C S d r
CNMM190616-HY 19.30  19.05  6.35  7.94  1.20 
CNMM190624-HY 19.30  19.05  6.35  7.94  1.60 
CNMM250924-HY 25.79  25.40  9.525  9.12  2.40 
CNMM250932-HY 25.79  25.40  9.525  9.12  3.20 

Our Advantages

  1. 1.Cutting edge inclination designation is good to control chip flow direction and obtains excellent surface quality

  2. 2.sharp cutting edge, small cutting force

  3. 3.good machining surface quality

  4. 4.special chipbreaker design to keep cutting edge sharp and safe

  5. 5.good anti impact resistance

  6. 6.excellent tool life time

  7. 7.High quality gravity turning inserts with competitive price

CVD Coated Cemented Carbide

Grade Description Equivalentto ISO
YC1015 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance in com bination with MT-TiCN, fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel. PO5~P15
YC1025 MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for sem i-finishing of steel. P10~P25
YC1035 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel. P20~P35
YC3025 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance in com bination with TiCN+AI2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is optimal for fin ishing and semi-finishing of stainless steel. M05~M15
YC3035 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with special micro structure in com bination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multilayer coating, which is optimal for fin ishing an d roughing of stainless steeI. M10~M25
YC3045 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent toughness in com bination with TiCN+AI2O3(thin)+TIN multi-layer coating, wh ich is optimal for sem i-finishing and roughing of stainless steel. M20~M35
YC2005 MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination withAl2O3(extra thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speed K05~K15
YC2015 MT-CVD coated, the substrate with exce lent hardness and stripping resistance in combination withAl203(thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is su itable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed. K10~K30
YC2025 MT-VD coated, the substrate with exce lent wear resistance and toughness in com bination withAl2O3(extra thick) + TiCN(thick) coating, which is suitable for the milling of cast iron(for example, nodular iron) at middle and high speed and interrupted turning. K20~K35


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Steel Inserts

item.title: Best price tungsten carbide inserts from china turning inserts Vnmg160404-TM/ Vnmg160408-TM/ Vnmg160412-TM (VNMG432)
item.description:
Code: Vnmg160404-TM/ Vnmg160408-TM/ Vnmg160412-TM (VNMG432)

Product Description

Dimension


                   
ISOLI.CSdr
VNMG160404-TM16.60 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.40 
VNMG160408-TM16.60 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.80 
VNMG160412-TM16.60 9.525 4.76 3.81 1.20 

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

● The  Carbide Turning Inserts we produce has special strength and toughness.

● We accept OEM and ODM, and can make unmarked or customized marking.

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

CNMG250932-TM25.79 25.40 9.525 9.12 3.20 

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

● Keep improving quality leading

● Not easy to stick knife

● Durable

● Row quick cutting

● Good finish

● Wide range of processing

● Our carbide inserts could to be processed Alloy steel, Tool steel, carbon steel, stainless steel, Cast iron and Titanium alloy.

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

 

Our carbide inserts sold very well in the domestic market, Europe, South America, Turkish, and Indian market.
It is the best quality, low price. We can satisfy all customers' requirements.

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.
item.author: Steel Inserts

item.title: DNMG110404/DNMG150408/DNMG150612 TM Series Tungsten Carbide high-quality external lathe cutter tools for steel CNC turning inserts
item.description:
Code: DNMG110404/DNMG150408/DNMG150612

Product Description

Dimension

   
                   
ISOLI.CSdr
DNMG110404-TM11.60 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.40 
DNMG110408-TM11.60 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.80

DNMG150408-TM15.50 12.70 4.76 5.16 0.80 
DNMG150412-TM15.50 12.70 4.76 5.16 1.20 
DNMG150604-TM15.50 12.70 6.35 5.16 0.40 
DNMG150608-TM15.50 12.70 6.35 5.16 0.80 
DNMG150612-TM15.50 12.70 6.35 5.16 1.20 

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP32252-4um AlCr + AlCrSiN PVD coating, combined with ultra-fine particle matrix, has high wear resistance, suitable for finishing and semi-finishing of heat-treated steel ,stainless steel and quenched steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YP3330The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with ultra-fine particle substrates, has high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of  stainless and hardened steel P10-P25
K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

 

1.Keep improving quality leading

2.Not easy to stick knife

3.Durable

4.Row quick cutting

5.Good finish

6.Wide range of processing

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual
✔ Technical Support: 20 years engineer in the CNC area

FAQ

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!
Q2: What is your minimum order requirement?
A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
Q3: What is the delivery time for production?
A3: We usually prepare rich stock for delivery upon payment, 30-35 days for items without stock.
Q4: Can you make Non-Standard items?
A4: We are specialized in inserts R&D, welcome specical items .
Q5: What about the package?
A5: We use plastic boxes to pack our products, and filled plastic is shockproof and transported in cartons. also It can make as you need and depend on the shapes of the product.

item.title: Cemented carbide inserts Lathe cutting for steel CNC triangular turning tool inserts TNMG160404-TM/TNMG160408-TM/TNMG160412-TM
item.description:
Code: Tnmg160404-TM/TNMG220408-TM/TNMG220412-TM

Product Description

Dimension

                    
ISOLI.CSdr
TNMG160404-TM16.50 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.40 
TNMG160408-TM16.50 9.525 4.76 3.81 0.80

TNMG220408-TM22.00 12.70 4.76 5.16 0.80 
TNMG220412-TM22.00 12.70 4.76 5.16 1.20 

Grades Description

CVD coated cemented carbide
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YC1015MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent wear resistance in combination with MT-TiCN,fine grained AL2O3TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for finishing of steel.P05-P15
YC1025MT-CVD coated, Cutting edge with good toughness in combination with  TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating,which is suitable for semi-finishing of steel.P10~P25
YC1035MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent toughness and plastic deformation resistance in combination with TiCN+Al2O3(thick)+TiN multi-layer coating, which is suitable for roughness of steel.P20-P35
YC1125Special strength toughness of the insert substrates,perfect combinations with MT-TiCN,ultra fine AL2O3,coatings ,common grade for steel,suitable for steel,cast iron,stainess steel in semi-finishing,finishingP10~P25
YC1315The combination of high wear-resistant substrate with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coatings,is a ideal grade of finishing processing of steel,stainess steel in the case of hight speed cutting.P10~P25
YC1325With optimized toughness and hardness of the substrate and MT-TiN, fine grain Al2O3 and TiN coating and with a special post-treatment process, the formation of excellent performance of the double-color coating, suitable for steel, stainless steel and cast iron in semi-finishing and finishingP10~P25
YC1335Substrate with high strength and strong resistance to plastic deformation combined with MT-TiCN,fine grained Al2O3 and TiN coating having great toughness,is suitable for light load ronghing of steel,stainess steel and cast ironP10~P25
YC2105MT-CVD coated, the super fine grain size substrate with excellent hardness in combination with  Al2O3(extra thick)  coating, the smooth surface, which is suitable for turning and milling of grey cast iron at high speedK05-K15
YC2115MT-CVD coated, the substrate with excellent hardness and stripping resistance in combination with Al2O3(thick) coating, the smooth surface of the tools, which is suitable for turning and milling of cast iron at middle and high speed.K10-K30
YC2215High wear-resistant substrate, new generation coating process with perfect combination of MTTI (CN), Super Al2O3, TiCN coating, initial grades of ductile cast iron, forged cast iron, high cutting speed allowanceK10~K30

 

PVD coated cemented carbide 
GradeDescriptionEquivalent to ISO
YP30252-4um TiALN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel,  cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishingP10-P25
K15-K30
YP31252-4um ALCr+ALCrSiN PVDcoated,combinating with ultra  fine particles'substrates with high-toughness, suitabe for all materials,stainless steel, steel , cast alloy in finishing,semi-finishing P10-P25

K15-K30
M10-M25

K15-K30
M10-M25
YR3025Unique material matrix, with 2-4um TiAlN PVD coating, with high toughness and heat resistance, suitable for high temperature alloy, heat resistant alloy and other difficult to process materials finishing, semi-finishingS10-S25
YR3325The latest AlCr + AlCrSin PVD coatings, combined with unique rare metal substrates, offer high wear resistance and excellent performance in finishing and semi-finishing of superalloys and heat resistant alloysS10-S25

Our Advantages

● Ultrafine cemented carbide

● Nice chip breaker

● Durable wear-resistance

● Good surface soomthness

Production Process


Packing & Delivery

Our Services

✔ Pre-sales Service: 24hours online by WhatsApp/ Wechat
✔ Sales Service: Professional sales quotation and precision price for you
✔ After-sales Service: 1-3 days by the delivery time as usual

Q1: Are you a trading company or manufacturer
A1: We are a manufacturer of carbide inserts. Our factory located in Zhuzhou  City, Hunan Province. Welcome to visit our factory!

A2: OEM and customization are available. we accept the small trial order, big order will get a big discount. and try our best to service our customers.
